[31m--[ [0m[34mMatch #[0m[33m1[0m[34m of [0m[33m99[0m[31m ]--[0m
   Rule Id: [34mBD000702[0m
       Tag: [34mSecurity.Backdoor.DataExfiltration.Environment[0m
  Severity: [36mImportant[0m, Confidence: [36mHigh[0m
  Filename: [33m/package/lib/concatSourceMap.js[0m
   Pattern: [32m(env|environment).{1,50}(get|post|curl|nc|invoke-restmethod)[0m
[30;1m19 | [0m[35m  } = result;[0m
[30;1m20 | [0m[35m  let inline = ''; // eslint-disable-next-line node/no-process-env[0m
[30;1m21 | [0m[35m[0m
[30;1m22 | [0m[35m  if (map && process.env.NODE_ENV === 'development') {[0m
[30;1m23 | [0m[35m    inline = Buffer.from(JSON.stringify(map)).toString('base64');[0m
[30;1m24 | [0m[35m    inline = `//# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;charset=utf-8;base64,${inline}`;[0m
